recommendations.title: Balto: Wolf Quest
recommendations.overview: Balto and his daughter Aleu embark on a journey of adventure and self discovery.

recommendations.title: Hello World
recommendations.overview: A shy high schooler in Kyoto meets a man claiming to be his future self, who tells him he’s hacked into the past to save their first love.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Infinite Two Minutes
recommendations.overview: A cafe owner discovers that the TV in his cafe suddenly shows images from the future, but only two minutes into the future.

recommendations.title: Night at the Museum: Kahmunrah Rises Again

recommendations.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!: The Dark Side of Dimensions
recommendations.overview: Having faced each other on countless occasions, Yugi and Kaiba again put their pride and experience to the test in a duel that transcends dimensions.

recommendations.title: Las leyendas: El origen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Adventure, Family, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a human baby crosses the Eternal Mirror, the portal between the living and the dead opens its path to the beings from the underworld.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

recommendations.title: Robin Robin
recommendations.overview: A bird raised by mice begins to question where she belongs and sets off on a daring journey of self-discovery.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Kiwi!
recommendations.overview: The story of a Kiwi who spends his whole life working towards achieving his dream.
